rationale: Builds on the current best soft quant-aware roundtrip, but stops over-regularizing every matrix equally. During the late quant-aware phase, full blend pressure now stays on attention/MLP projection weights while other int8 matrices only get a light nudge, preserving step quality and letting the model adapt where roundtrip error matters most. The script stays under the 1500-line cap and passes a syntax check.
title: Projection-Focused Soft Quant Ramp
